description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build-simulator and build-compiler. The build-simulator job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, windows-2022, and macos-10.15, and installs system requirements, sets up Python 3.7, installs Conan, and builds a simulator using CMake and Ninja. The build-compiler job depends on build-simulator, runs on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04 and windows-2022, and installs system requirements, sets up .NET 6.0.x, installs Vulkan SDK and SwiftShader, downloads the simulator artifact, and builds and tests a compiler using dotnet.
